description: Project-curated codon usage reference data generated from source records with explicit provenance.
license: Mixed provenance. Each reference records its own source and redistribution note.
notes: The synthetic seed reference is intentionally not organism-specific.
Organism-specific references should be generated into checked-in JSON with source, version, access date, genetic code, units, assumptions, and validation totals.
Generated references are compact derived data. Keep source-fetching and parsing steps documented in scripts/reference-data/README.md.
